title: 0-99 Spotting Grid for Play-by-Play Commentators
description: A data-driven '0–99' spotting grid for play-by-play commentators, designed to be printed and referenced during live games. Built using team rosters, phonetic pronunciations, and special teams snap counts.
longDescription: Built using team rosters, phonetic pronunciations, and special teams snap counts to create a clear, visual roster card that supports fast, accurate identification on the call. Especially valuable in college football, where duplicate jersey numbers are common in special teams situations. A simple, game-ready tool that reduces on-air friction and helps broadcasters call plays with confidence and speed.

title: Matchup Scouting Deep Dive
description: A custom matchup analysis product for football broadcasters and teams, designed to support game preparation, storytelling, and strategic planning.
longDescription: Ingests a full season of play-by-play data for selected teams and compares them head-to-head to surface deeper, more contextual insights. Supports highly specific questions: 'Middle 8' performance, points scored following turnovers, and offensive reliance on specific receivers in third-down and red-zone situations.
note: Best viewed on desktop or tablet

title: Snap Counts & Player Participation
description: College football analytics focused on snap counts and player participation, helping teams and analysts understand usage patterns and game flow.
longDescription: Ingests PFF snap count data and visually illustrates each position group's participation throughout the season. Play-by-play commentators can quickly understand how injuries, depth changes, and other factors have impacted their teams.

title: One Play a Day
description: A searchable database of curated football plays sourced from Coach Dan Casey's daily email newsletter.
longDescription: Automatically extracts plays from email, converts GIF animations to optimized MP4 video, uploads media to a global CDN, and deploys updates to a responsive web interface. Currently contains 440+ plays spanning NFL and college football.

title: College Basketball Data Generator
description: Coalesces data from multiple sources to create customized reports for college basketball broadcasters.
longDescription: A full self-service application that allows broadcasters to generate a data report for any NCAA team. Fetches from multiple data sources so users get all their data in one place—instead of clicking through 10+ different domains.

title: DossierBot
description: A professional briefing tool that helps sports broadcasters, coaches, and executives get up to speed on a person quickly.
longDescription: An AI-powered research product that generates comprehensive dossiers on sports-world professionals. Surfaces recent public signals, career history, and contextual insights — giving broadcasters and front-office staff a structured, ready-to-use briefing before meetings, calls, or game broadcasts.

title: Misery Index
description: A recruiting tool that shows recruits the impact on their family's ability to watch them play, based on what school they choose relative to their hometown.
longDescription: A tool that quantifies the travel burden for college football programs across conferences. Computes total miles traveled, number of flights needed, estimated travel costs, and home game accessibility to produce a single "Misery Score" per team. Helps fans and analysts understand the real-world impact of conference realignment on team travel logistics.
